system.description: A subtype applied to any creature when it is not on its home plane. Any creature that travels the planes can gain or lose this subtype as it goes from plane to plane. Monster entries assume that encounters with creatures take place on the Material Plane, and every creature whose home plane is not the Material Plane has the extraplanar subtype (but would not have it when on its home plane). Outsiders with the native subtype are native to the Material Plane and thus never have the extraplanar subtype.
